text: Welcome to Tycoon — the elegant property trading game.
House Rule: You cannot buy until you pass GO once without going to Jail.
If you go to Jail before that first pass, buying stays locked for the first lap.
This is a property. You cannot buy yet, so we'll trigger an auction.
Houses and hotels require complete ownership of a color set, and must be built evenly across properties.
When you own all Dark Blue, add houses evenly to Park Place and Boardwalk.
